source_jobs.title: Senior Infrastructure Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About the Role:

We're looking for a Senior Infrastructure Engineer to build and run Somnia's key backend
services: the L1 and node fleet, RPC and indexing layers, product backends, and
developer-facing services teams depend on. An SRE-minded role: you make reliability
measurable, rollouts safe, and infrastructure repeatable, so every team can move fast without
breaking things.

You treat infrastructure as a product: automate relentlessly, measure everything, and leverage
AI to accelerate development, operations, and incident response.

Key Responsibilities:

Define and maintain SLOs, SLIs, and error budgets, plus the observability—metrics,
logs, traces and alerts—that catches regressions before users do.
Build repeatable, self-service infrastructure through infrastructure-as-code, CI/CD and
golden paths so teams can provision, deploy and recover without reinventing the wheel.
Own rollouts end-to-end—progressive delivery, canaries, safe migrations and clean
rollbacks.
Operate the systems behind Somnia's nodes, validators, RPC and indexing, tuning for
performance and cost across regions.
Lead incident response and on-call, run blameless postmortems, and continuously
harden the platform.
Partner with product and protocol teams to design and operate production-ready
services. You'll rotate between embedding with engineering teams and building the
shared platform, tooling and operational standards that underpin the wider organisation.

Requirements:

Must Have

 - Strong experience operating production infrastructure at scale (cloud and/or bare metal), with deep Linux fundamentals.

 - Experience with infrastructure-as-code such as Terraform or Pulumi, alongside configuration management.

 - Experience running containers and orchestration platforms (Docker, Kubernetes) in production.

 - Strong programming skills, ideally in Go and/or TypeScript, for building automation and internal tooling.

 - Experience with observability stacks (Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry or equivalents).

 - Experience operating and monitoring distributed systems, including capacity planning and performance tuning.

 - Comfortable operating in high-stakes production environments and responding to incidents.

 - Genuine interest in crypto and on-chain systems.

Nice to Have

 - Experience operating blockchain node infrastructure (validators, RPC, archive nodes) for an L1/L2.

 - Experience with high-performance networking, low-latency systems or load balancing at
   scale.

 - Multi-region and geo-distributed deployments with failover strategies.

 - Security and key management (HSMs, secrets management, hardening).

 - EVM tooling and the wider Web3 infrastructure ecosystem.

What Success Looks Like

 - Engineers can deploy safely and frequently with confidence.

 - Platform reliability is measurable, with well-defined SLOs and continuously improving service health.

 - Infrastructure is automated, repeatable and increasingly self-service.

 - Incidents become less frequent, easier to diagnose and faster to resolve.

 - Product teams spend more time shipping features and less time managing infrastructure.

Why Join Somnia?

Design The Future: Join Somnia to work remotely with a global team, earn competitive compensation with token incentives, and help build the future of Web3 at a company where your impact truly matters.

First of its Kind: Make Somnia famous as the only hyperspeed L1 with native AI inference.

High Stakes: Influence a brand targeting a $1M+ launch budget in the 2026 peak-fragility market.

Incentives: Competitive salary + tokens.

Role Location

The role is remote, but we are looking for someone based in Europe or Asia (preferably).

source_jobs.title: Demo Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Somnia:

SOMNIA is the Agentic Chain - a hyper-performance L1 operating at an order of magnitude faster than existing networks. We empower builders and traders to create real-time, autonomous, and fully decentralized products, powered by agents, that were previously impossible and cannot be built anywhere else. It’s where the future of Web3 protocols will be built, so we’re facilitating a new wave of on-chain applications from DEX to Prediction Protocols and much, much more.

Somnia is being developed by Somnia Foundation backed by Improbable https://www.improbable.io/, a British tech Unicorn +++ that has been at the forefront of building virtual worlds for over a decade. Somnia received initial funding from MSquared https://www.msquared.io/, which raised $150 million https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20220407005101/en/Improbable-Raises-US150m-to-Establish-M%C2%B2-MSquared-a-Metaverse-Network-and-Ecosystem-Powered-by-Its-Morpheus-Technology from a16z crypto, SoftBank, Mirana Ventures, CMT Digital, and SIG.



About the Role:

We're looking for a Demo Engineer to build compelling tangible demonstrations of what's possible on Somnia. You'll take concepts from DeFi mechanics to agentic workflows and turn them into working prototypes, live demos, and visual content that makes developers and users say "I need to build on this."

This is a hands-on builder role. You won't be waiting for briefs. You'll spot opportunities, prototype fast, and ship things that make Somnia's capabilities real and visible. You should be someone who reaches for AI tools instinctively and treats them as a multiplier on your output.



Key Responsibilities:

 - Build demo dApps that showcase Somnia's speed, cost, and execution (e.g., real-time trading interfaces, onchain games, agent-powered apps).

 - Create trading bot demos that highlight Somnia's execution, the advantages of onchain order books and our agentic workflows.

 - Prototype agentic apps autonomous agents coordinating onchain, prediction market resolvers, agent-to-agent interactions

 - Ideate independently monitor the ecosystem, spot trends, and propose demos that position Somnia ahead of competitors

 - Collaborate with DevRel, Marketing, and BD to align demos with GTM priorities and partnership opportunities

Requirements:

Must have:

 - Solid Solidity and EVM development experience (writing, deploying, and interacting with smart contracts)

 - Ability to build frontend interfaces for demos (framework of your choice)

 - Strong self-direction — you generate ideas, not just execute them

 - Comfort with rapid prototyping; shipping a rough demo in days, not weeks

 - Heavy use of AI tools as a core part of your development workflow

 - Good instincts for what makes a demo compelling vs. forgettable

 - Clear written and verbal communication

Nice to have:

 - Experience producing video walkthroughs and live coding sessions that break down how demos work under the hood

 - Ability to create reusable starter kits and templates that lower the barrier for new developers

 - Experience with CLOB/orderbook-based DEXs or trading systems

 - Strong design skills for presenting demos

 - Familiarity with AI agent frameworks or autonomous agent design

 - Video production or live streaming experience

 - Previous DevRel, hackathon, or developer education work

 - Understanding of DeFi primitives (AMMs, lending, stablecoins, yield)



Why Join Somnia?

Design The Future: Join Somnia to work remotely with a global team, earn competitive compensation with token incentives, and help build the future of Web3 at a company where your impact truly matters.

First of its Kind: Make Somnia famous as the only hyperspeed L1 with native AI inference.

High Stakes: Influence a brand targeting a $1M+ launch budget in the 2026 peak-fragility market.

Incentives: Competitive salary + tokens.



Role Location

The role is remote, but we are looking for someone based in Europe or Asia (preferably).

Reporting

source_jobs.title: Legal Counsel
source_jobs.description:
About Somnia:
SOMNIA is the Agentic Chain - a hyper-performance L1 operating at an order of magnitude faster than existing networks. We empower builders and traders to create real-time, autonomous, and fully decentralized products, powered by agents, that were previously impossible and cannot be built anywhere else. It’s where the future of Web3 protocols will be built, so we’re facilitating a new wave of on-chain applications from DEX to Prediction Protocols and much, much more.

Somnia is being developed by Somnia Foundation backed by Improbable https://www.improbable.io/, a British tech Unicorn +++ that has been at the forefront of building virtual worlds for over a decade. Somnia received initial funding from MSquared https://www.msquared.io/, which raised $150 million https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20220407005101/en/Improbable-Raises-US150m-to-Establish-M%C2%B2-MSquared-a-Metaverse-Network-and-Ecosystem-Powered-by-Its-Morpheus-Technology from a16z crypto, SoftBank, Mirana Ventures, CMT Digital, and SIG.

About the Role:

Somnia is looking for a Legal Counsel to work directly alongside our Legal Director across the full breadth of the network's legal work. This is a broad, hands-on role. You will own day-to-day legal matters, negotiate commercial agreements and NDAs, and act as a first point of contact for legal questions from across the business.

You will report directly to the Legal Director and work closely with them. We expect you to drive matters forward on your own, but you will never be doing it alone because you will have direct, continuous support from a senior lawyer, which makes this an unusually fast way to grow. Somnia operates at the intersection of blockchain, DeFi, and AI across a multi-entity, international structure, so the work is varied and no two weeks look the same.

Key Responsibilities:

 - Draft, review, and negotiate commercial agreements, vendor and SaaS contracts, NDAs, and related documentation.

 - Handle day-to-day legal questions from teams across the business and give practical, commercially grounded answers.

 - Support product and corporate legal work across Somnia's entities and jurisdictions.

 - Track developments in crypto and digital-asset regulation (for example MiCA, Clarity Act, and comparable frameworks) and turn them into actionable guidance.

 - Maintain and improve internal templates, playbooks, and contract-tracking processes.

 - Coordinate with external counsel where specialist input is needed.

Requirements:

 - A law degree and the possibility to work core hours in the CET timezone (Europe preferred).

 - One to three years of relevant legal experience, ideally gained at a law firm or in-house.

 - A genuine interest in both crypto and AI. Hands-on crypto or Web3 experience is a strong plus but not required.

 - The ability to run matters independently while knowing when to escalate.

 - Strong drafting and negotiation skills, and clear written English.

 - Comfort working in a fast-moving, high-volume environment.

Why Join Somnia?

Design The Future: Join Somnia to work remotely with a global team, earn competitive compensation with token incentives, and help build the future of Web3 at a company where your impact truly matters.

First of its Kind: Make Somnia famous as the only hyperspeed L1 with native AI inference.

High Stakes: Influence a brand targeting a $1M+ launch budget in the 2026 peak-fragility market.

Incentives: Competitive salary + tokens.



Role Location

The role is remote, but we are looking for someone based in Europe or Asia (preferably).

Reporting Lines

This role reports to Legal Director

source_jobs.title: Head of Marketing
source_jobs.description:
About Somnia:

SOMNIA is the Agentic Chain - a hyper-performance L1 operating at an order of magnitude faster than existing networks. We empower builders and traders to create real-time, autonomous, and fully decentralized products, powered by agents, that were previously impossible and cannot be built anywhere else. It’s where the future of Web3 protocols will be built, so we’re facilitating a new wave of on-chain applications from DEX to Prediction Protocols and much, much more.

Somnia is being developed by Somnia Foundation backed by Improbable https://www.improbable.io/, a British tech Unicorn +++ that has been at the forefront of building virtual worlds for over a decade. Somnia received initial funding from MSquared https://www.msquared.io/, which raised $150 million https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20220407005101/en/Improbable-Raises-US150m-to-Establish-M%C2%B2-MSquared-a-Metaverse-Network-and-Ecosystem-Powered-by-Its-Morpheus-Technology from a16z crypto, SoftBank, Mirana Ventures, CMT Digital, and SIG.

About the Role:

We're hiring a Head of Marketing to own the marketing engine across the entire Somnia ecosystem: the L1 itself plus every product built on top, including (but not limited to) DreamDEX, Prophecy, and the upcoming products. This is the most senior marketing role at Somnia. You'll report directly to the CEO, sit on the leadership team, and be responsible for turning a technically extraordinary L1 into the most actively used and recognized agentic chain.

You'll lead a globally distributed marketing function spanning product marketing, social, KOLs, events, paid media, and comms, and shape how it operates around the products in the Somnia ecosystem. Your job is to make the team ship faster, sharper, and with measurable impact.

This is a player-coach role. You'll write the strategy, set the targets, and run the operating cadence, but you'll also redline the launch brief, kill the bad campaign, and own the narrative yourself when it matters. The team is small enough that you ship work, not just coordinate it.

You've done this before in Web3. You've taken at least one web3 product from "nobody's heard of us" to category-defining, and you know exactly what breaks at each stage. You're allergic to vanity metrics, fluent in on-chain data, and you understand that in this market a single great launch beats a quarter of consistent posting.

If you want to build the marketing org that defines what an Agentic L1 looks like in market, and you've got the scars to do it, let's talk.

Key Responsibilities:

Strategy and operating model

 - Own the end-to-end marketing strategy across Somnia L1 and the products built on top, starting with DreamDEX and Prophecy. Sequence launches and campaigns so each beat compounds the last.

 - Shape the marketing operating model so the team is structured around products and outcomes - the right mix of product marketing, content, design, paid, KOLs, community, events, and dev rel firing in coordination behind each launch.

 - Set the weekly operating rhythm: targets, reviews, post-mortems. Kill what isn't working fast; double down on what is.

Growth and user acquisition

 - Own the growth numbers. Set the targets with the CEO and product leads, then deliver them.

 - Run the full acquisition stack: organic content engines, paid (when unit economics open the gate), KOL programs, season campaigns, referral loops, and partner-led growth.

 - Build the analytics layer that turns on-chain and community data into prioritization for the team and outreach assets for BD.

Positioning, narrative and brand

 - Own the master Somnia narrative: what an Agentic L1 actually means, the proof points, the competitive frame. Cascade it into each product's positioning so sub-brands strengthen the master.

 - Define and protect the visual identity, tone of voice, and brand governance across every team and channel.

 - Lead positioning and messaging for every launch in the Somnia ecosystem.

Retentio

source_jobs.title: Product Marketing Manager, Prophecy
source_jobs.description:
About Somnia:

SOMNIA is the Agentic Chain - a hyper-performance L1 operating at an order of magnitude faster than existing networks. We empower builders and traders to create real-time, autonomous, and fully decentralized products, powered by agents, that were previously impossible and cannot be built anywhere else. It’s where the future of Web3 protocols will be built, so we’re facilitating a new wave of on-chain applications from DEX to Prediction Protocols and much, much more.

Somnia is being developed by Somnia Foundation backed by Improbable https://www.improbable.io/, a British tech Unicorn +++ that has been at the forefront of building virtual worlds for over a decade. Somnia received initial funding from MSquared https://www.msquared.io/, which raised $150 million https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20220407005101/en/Improbable-Raises-US150m-to-Establish-M%C2%B2-MSquared-a-Metaverse-Network-and-Ecosystem-Powered-by-Its-Morpheus-Technology from a16z crypto, SoftBank, Mirana Ventures, CMT Digital, and SIG.

About the Role:

Prophecy is Somnia's prediction protocol - a flagship product designed to prove what an Agentic L1 actually unlocks: sub-second markets, AI-resolved outcomes, and autonomous agents trading information at machine speed. Prophecy enables prediction markets to be real-time, agent-native, and an order of magnitude faster than any incumbent is today.

We're hiring a Product Marketing Manager to own how Prophecy shows up in the world. You'll be the connective tissue between product, growth, comms, and community, translating a deeply technical edge into positioning that traders, builders, and partners immediately get. You'll own the narrative, lead every launch, and run the experiments that turn a new prediction protocol into a category-defining brand.

This is a builder's role, not a steward's. You'll be writing the playbook. The team is small, decisions are fast, and the work shows up in market within weeks.

Up for shaping the next chapter of on-chain prediction markets? Let's talk.

Key Responsibilities:

 - Own positioning and messaging for Prophecy end-to-end: what it is, who it's for, why it's different, and why now. Translate technical primitives (real-time settlement, AI resolution, agentic liquidity) into sharp, defensible narratives that work across trader, builder, and partner audiences.

 - Lead go-to-market for every Prophecy launch: mainnet milestones, new market categories, agent integrations, partner activations, and token / incentive moments. Run cross-functional launch pods spanning product, engineering, comms, growth, design, and BD.

 - Define and run the marketing roadmap for Prophecy in lockstep with the product and community leads. Sequence launches, campaigns, and content so each beat compounds on the last instead of competing for airtime.

 - Build the audience. Design and execute always-on programs that grow Prophecy's qualified builders base.

 - Own competitive intelligence. Maintain a live read on the competitive landscape such that you understand how to differentiate and position Prophecy

 - Run customer and market research. Talk to traders, builders, and KOLs continuously. Bring insight back into product roadmap, pricing, and creative.

 - Brief and produce content that earns attention in the web3 space: launch threads, longform research notes, explainer videos, dashboards, KOL kits, conference assets, and AMA narratives. Quality bar is "screenshotted on CT," not "ticked the box."

 - Partner with comms on tier-1 press, podcast bookings, and thought leadership. Land Prophecy in the publications and shows the target audience actually reads and listens to.

 - Instrument everything. Define the KPIs that matter and own the weekly reporting rhythm. Kill what isn't working, double down on what is.

 - Be the channel partner-in-chief internally. Brief channel owners on the Prophecy narrative so every channel ships consistent, on-message activations without you in the room.

Re

source_jobs.title: Full-Stack Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Somnia:

SOMNIA is the Agentic Chain - a hyper-performance L1 operating at an order of magnitude faster than existing networks. We empower builders and traders to create real-time, autonomous, and fully decentralized products, powered by agents, that were previously impossible and cannot be built anywhere else. It’s where the future of Web3 protocols will be built, so we’re facilitating a new wave of on-chain applications from DEX to Prediction Protocols and much, much more.

Somnia is being developed by Somnia Foundation backed by Improbable https://www.improbable.io/, a British tech Unicorn +++ that has been at the forefront of building virtual worlds for over a decade. Somnia received initial funding from MSquared https://www.msquared.io/, which raised $150 million https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20220407005101/en/Improbable-Raises-US150m-to-Establish-M%C2%B2-MSquared-a-Metaverse-Network-and-Ecosystem-Powered-by-Its-Morpheus-Technology from a16z crypto, SoftBank, Mirana Ventures, CMT Digital, and SIG.

About the Role:

We're looking for a Full-Stack Engineer to build across the breadth of what Somnia ships, from consumer-facing products to developer technologies to internal platform and tooling. One month that's a polished end-user app, the next it's an SDK, a CLI, or the internal systems the rest of the team builds on.

This is a role for someone who cares as much about the product as the code.

You'll own the full lifecycle, from rapid prototyping to deployment. You use AI tools as a multiplier and like shipping end-to-end.

Key Responsibilities:

 - Design and build production-grade products end-to-end—back-end through UI—across consumer apps, developer-facing technologies and internal platform tooling.

 - Build the high-performance back-ends and services these products depend on.

 - Create developer technologies—SDKs, APIs, CLIs, libraries and starter kits—that make the platform easy to build on.

 - Build internal tooling and platform infrastructure that raises the velocity of the whole team.

 - Work self-directed: watch the ecosystem and the team's needs, spot gaps and propose and build what moves things forward.

 - Work with DevRel, Marketing and BD so what you build lands with users and developers and fits go-to-market.

Must Have: Full-Stack Foundation

 - Strong TypeScript across the full stack—this is the core of the role and our app stack. Some Golang where it fits.

 - Build high-quality, production-ready frontends.

 - Strong back-end engineering—APIs, services and the data layer behind them.

 - Genuine interest in crypto and on-chain products.

 - Strong ownership and self-direction—you generate ideas, not just execute them.

 - Able to turn the dial: prototype fast and loose to prove a feature out, then shift into steady-state mode to harden what's worth keeping—tests, edge cases, reliability.

Nice to Have

 - Web3 / on-chain experience—smart contracts (Solidity/EVM), wallets, or building dApps.

 - Experience building developer technologies—SDKs, APIs, CLIs, or libraries—and the docs and starter kits around them.

 - Strong design skills for polished product UIs.

 - A good grasp of the competitive landscape—and what makes web3 products good.

Why Join Somnia?

Design The Future: Join Somnia to work remotely with a global team, earn competitive compensation with token incentives, and help build the future of Web3 at a company where your impact truly matters.

First of its Kind: Make Somnia famous as the only hyperspeed L1 with native AI inference.

High Stakes: Influence a brand targeting a $1M+ launch budget in the 2026 peak-fragility market.

Incentives: Competitive salary + tokens.

Role Location

The role is remote, but we are looking for someone based in Europe or Asia (preferably).

source_jobs.title: Product Marketing Manager, DreamDEX
source_jobs.description:
About Somnia:

SOMNIA is the Agentic Chain - a hyper-performance L1 operating at an order of magnitude faster than existing networks. We empower builders and traders to create real-time, autonomous, and fully decentralized products, powered by agents, that were previously impossible and cannot be built anywhere else. It’s where the future of Web3 protocols will be built, so we’re facilitating a new wave of on-chain applications from DEX to Prediction Protocols and much, much more.

Somnia is being developed by Somnia Foundation backed by Improbable https://www.improbable.io/, a British tech Unicorn +++ that has been at the forefront of building virtual worlds for over a decade. Somnia received initial funding from MSquared https://www.msquared.io/, which raised $150 million https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20220407005101/en/Improbable-Raises-US150m-to-Establish-M%C2%B2-MSquared-a-Metaverse-Network-and-Ecosystem-Powered-by-Its-Morpheus-Technology from a16z crypto, SoftBank, Mirana Ventures, CMT Digital, and SIG.

About the Role:

As Product Marketing Manager for DreamDEX, you will own how DreamDEX shows up in the world: how it's positioned, how it grows, and how the world talks about it. You understand onchain trading and its audiences deeply - alpha groups, trading communities, and professional traders and you can translate that understanding into messaging that resonates with them. You'll work closely with Product, and the Head of Marketing to make DreamDEX the go-to platform for professional capital trading.

What you'll own

Positioning & Messaging: Own positioning, messaging, and narrative for DreamDEX

 - Own positioning and messaging for DreamDEX across its core retail audiences: alpha groups, trading communities and professional traders

 - Craft a differentiation story grounded in real product strengths such as CEX-grade execution onchain, zero protocol fees, yield-bearing collateral & native agent support

 - Simplify a deeply technical product narrative: explain how the platform works for both professional traders and for traders coming onchain for the first time

Go-to-Market & Launches

 - Lead GTM for new launches, product capabilities, and ecosystem features, from brief through to post-launch measurement

 - Build repeatable launch playbooks consolidating learnings across channels - KOLs, events, community, content, social and PR

 - Partner with Product to shape the roadmap based on user insights, customer feedback and community trends for maximum launch impact and efficiency

Competitive & Market Intelligence

 - Be the team’s expert on the onchain derivatives, CLOB landscape, and emerging platforms - including trends, trader insights and market takeaways

 - Turn that intelligence into positioning, product recommendations, and growth tactics

 - Track sentiment and report on how DreamDEX is perceived by trading communities, retail, and professional traders

Adoption, Retention & Enablement

 - Scale the DreamDEX distribution engine through growth and retention tactics such as community leaderboards, yield based rebates, and referral mechanics

 - Establish DreamDEX as the default venue for professional capital onchain; drive awareness and education of what it enables and deliver on adoption goals

 - Support BD team with key assets - decks, one-pagers, proof points that win market makers, institutional desks, and KOLs

What we're looking for

 - 5-7 years in product marketing or a closely related role, with at least 3 years of hands-on experience in Web3, or a consumer fintech/trading product

 - Experience with retail trading products or exchanges, and a genuine understanding of how order books, derivatives/perps work

 - Proven ability to own positioning and messaging for a product or protocol and execute GTM campaigns across channels

 - Track record of leading product launches end to end, with measurable results

 - Strong grasp of crypto-native culture and communities, including X, Discord, and Web3

notes: Web3-focused blockchain company with a strong engineering core
